parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of a conversation item.

parameters.name: participantId
parameters.description: The participant ID of a conversation item.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: The override language of a conversation item in BCP 47 language representation.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: The role of the participant.

parameters.name: itn
parameters.description: Inverse Text Normalization representation of input. The inverse-text-normalized form is the recognized text from Microsoft’s Speech to Text API, with phone numbers, numbers, abbreviations, and other transformations applied.

parameters.name: maskedItn
parameters.description: The Inverse Text Normalized format with profanity masking applied.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The display form of the recognized text from speech to text API, with punctuation and capitalization added.

parameters.name: lexical
parameters.description: The lexical form of the recognized text from speech to text API with the actual words recognized.

parameters.name: word
parameters.description: The word recognized.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset from start of speech audio, in ticks. 1 tick = 100 ns.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration of word articulation, in ticks. 1 tick = 100 ns.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: The language of the conversation item in BCP-47 format.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Enumeration of supported conversational domains.

parameters.name: piiCategories
parameters.description: Describes the PII categories to return for detection. If not provided, 'default' categories will be returned which will vary with the language.

parameters.name: includeAudioRedaction
parameters.description: Flag to indicate if audio redaction is requested. By default audio redaction will not be performed.

parameters.name: redactionSource
parameters.description: Enumeration of supported transcript content types.

returns.raw:
Contains the status of the analyze conversations job submitted along with related statistics.
- Body
- ConversationalPIITranscriptJobState

parameters.description: It controls the approximate number of sentences in the output summaries.

parameters.name: loggingOptOut
parameters.description: (Optional) If set to true, you opt-out of having your text input logged for troubleshooting. By default, Azure Cognitive Service for Language logs your input text for 48 hours, solely to allow for troubleshooting issues in providing you with the Azure Cognitive Service for Language natural language processing functions. Setting this parameter to true, disables input logging and may limit our ability to remediate issues that occur. Please see Cognitive Services Compliance and Privacy notes at https://aka.ms/cs-compliance for additional details, and Microsoft Responsible AI principles at https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/ai/responsible-ai.

parameters.name: stringIndexType
parameters.description: (Optional) Specifies the method used to interpret string offsets. Defaults to Text Elements (Graphemes) according to Unicode v8.0.0. For additional information see https://aka.ms/text-analytics-offsets

parameters.name: Project Name
parameters.description: This is the Project name you want to use.

parameters.name: Question
parameters.description: User question to query against the project.

parameters.name: User ID
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the user.

parameters.name: Top #
parameters.description: Maximum number of answers to be returned for the question.

parameters.name: Confidence Threshold
parameters.description: Minimum threshold score for answers. Value ranges from 0 to 1.

parameters.name: Ranker type
parameters.description: Type of ranker to be used.

parameters.name: QnA ID
parameters.description: This is the exact QnA ID to fetch from project.

parameters.name: Previous QnA ID
parameters.description: Previous turn top answer result QnA ID.

parameters.name: Previous User Query
parameters.description: Previous user query.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Metadata Key from Metadata dictionary used in the QnA.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Metadata Value from Metadata dictionary used in the QnA.

parameters.name: Join Metadata with
parameters.description: Set 'OR' or 'AND' for corresponding logical operation for metadata filters.

parameters.name: Source Filter
parameters.description: Find QnAs that are associated with any of the given list of sources in project.

parameters.name: Join Filters with
parameters.description: Logical operation used to join metadata filter with source filter.

parameters.name: Enable precise answer
parameters.description: Enable or disable Answer Span prediction.

parameters.name: Confidence Threshold
parameters.description: Minimum threshold score required to include a precise answer, value ranges from 0 to 1.

parameters.name: Top #
parameters.description: Number of Top answers to be considered for precise answer prediction from 1 to 10.

parameters.name: Include Unstructured Sources
parameters.description: Flag to enable query over unstructured sources.

parameters.name: Deployment Name
parameters.description: This is the specific deployment of the project you want to use.

parameters.name: API Version
parameters.description: This is the Client API version.

returns.raw:
Represents List of Question Answers.
- Body
- AnswersResult

parameters.description: (Optional) This value indicates which model will be used for scoring. If a model-version is not specified, the API should default to the latest, non-preview version.

parameters.name: showStats
parameters.description: (Optional) if set to true, response will contain request and document level statistics.

parameters.name: loggingOptOut
parameters.description: (Optional) If set to true, you opt-out of having your text input logged for troubleshooting. By default, Azure Cognitive Service for Language logs your input text for 48 hours, solely to allow for troubleshooting issues in providing you with the Azure Cognitive Service for Language natural language processing functions. Setting this parameter to true, disables input logging and may limit our ability to remediate issues that occur. Please see Cognitive Services Compliance and Privacy notes at https://aka.ms/cs-compliance for additional details, and Microsoft Responsible AI principles at https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/ai/responsible-ai.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique, non-empty document identifier.

parameters.name: Model Version
parameters.description: (Optional) This value indicates which model will be used for scoring. If a model-version is not specified, the API should default to the latest, non-preview version.

parameters.name: Show Statistics
parameters.description: (Optional) if set to true, response will contain input and document level statistics.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique, non-empty document identifier.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The input text to process.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: (Optional) This is the 2 letter ISO 639-1 representation of a language. For example, use "en" for English; "es" for Spanish etc. If not set, use "en" for English as default.

parameters.name: opinionMining
parameters.description: (Optional) if set to true, response will contain not only sentiment prediction but also opinion mining (aspect-based sentiment analysis) results.

parameters.name: stringIndexType
parameters.description: (Optional) Specifies the method used to interpret string offsets. Defaults to Text Elements (Graphemes) according to Unicode v8.0.0. For additional information see https://aka.ms/text-analytics-offsets
